title: Slack workspace member access state
description: Per-member access METADATA from the Slack admin users API — one record per workspace member per run. Membership/role/2FA metadata ONLY; the connector never reads message content, DMs, or channel history (slice 443 threat-model I). Feeds access-control evidence (who has workspace access, who is admin/owner) plus 2FA-enforcement coverage.

handle.description: Public display name / handle. Never a private profile field or any message content.

deleted.description: True for a deactivated/deprovisioned account — the correct end state.

has_2fa.description: True if the member has two-factor authentication enabled.

reason.description: Human-readable reason when the access verdict is fail/inconclusive.
